introSection: Tidal Wave is a steel roller coaster located at Trimper's Rides in Ocean City, Maryland, USA. It is a Vekoma Boomerang installation.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train ascends a lift hill of 116.5 feet backwards before dropping into a cobra roll and a vertical loop before repeating the course backwards.

fullText:
Tidal Wave is a steel roller coaster located at Trimper's Rides in Ocean City, Maryland, USA. It is a Vekoma Boomerang installation.

The train ascends a lift hill of 116.5 feet backwards before dropping into a cobra roll and a vertical loop before repeating the course backwards.
